user.title: Connect to labelito
user.description: Enter the address of your labelito label printing service.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address where labelito is running.
data_description.api_token: The API_TOKEN configured on the labelito service. Leave empty if labelito runs with ALLOW_UNAUTHENTICATED=true.

hassio_confirm.title: labelito add-on discovered
hassio_confirm.description: Do you want to add the labelito add-on ({host}) to Home Assistant?

reauth_confirm.title: Update labelito API token
reauth_confirm.description: The labelito service rejected the stored API token. Enter the current one.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the labelito service.
error.invalid_auth: The labelito service rejected the API token.
error.unsupported_api_version: The labelito service speaks an unsupported API version. Update this integration or the labelito service.

abort.already_configured: This labelito service is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the discovered labelito add-on.
abort.invalid_auth: The discovered labelito add-on rejected the API token.
abort.unsupported_api_version: The discovered labelito add-on speaks an unsupported API version.

init.title: labelito options
init.description: Printer status poll interval in seconds. The default is {network_default} s for network printers and {usb_default} s for USB (a USB status read briefly claims the printer).

print.name: Print label
print.description: Print a physical label on the Brother QL printer via labelito, using a named template and its field values.

template.name: Template
template.description: Name of the labelito template to print, for example "pantry". Validated against the live template list.

fields.name: Fields
fields.description: Values for the template's placeholders, as a mapping of field name to value.

copies.name: Copies
copies.description: Number of identical copies to print (1-10).

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: Render and validate without sending anything to the printer.

language.name: Language
language.description: Language tag for the label's translated chrome and date formatting.

cut.name: Cut
cut.description: Cut the label after printing. Defaults to true on the server.

red.name: Red
red.description: Two-color (red/black) printing on supported printers and media.

idempotency_key.name: Idempotency key
idempotency_key.description: Optional stable key so labelito can dedupe a retried request and avoid a double print. Leave unset for a fresh key per call.

config_entry_id.name: labelito instance
config_entry_id.description: Which configured labelito service to print on. Only needed with multiple instances.

reprint_last.name: Reprint last label
reprint_last.description: Print the most recent label printed through Home Assistant again, exactly as the first time.

config_entry_id.name: labelito instance
config_entry_id.description: Which configured labelito service to reprint on. Only needed with multiple instances.
